title: Climate Change and Health Organizations in Africa
description: A directory of organizations working at the intersection of climate change and health in Africa, including their focus areas, partners, funders, and locations.

columns.scope: Geographic scope of work (e.g. Africa, Global, Regional, National)
columns.projects_and_thematic_focus: List of projects or thematic focus areas the organization works on
columns.partners: List of partner organizations collaborating on the work
columns.project_location: Specific countries or regions where projects are implemented
columns.funder: List of funders supporting the organization or projects
columns.link: Website or project URL for more information
